CONTENT.Career: In 2017, Spadanuda signed for Swiss eighth tier side FC Schinznach-Bad. Before the second half of 2017–18, he signed for Schöftland in the Swiss fifth tier. In 2018, he signed for Swiss fourth tier club FC Baden. In 2019, Spadanuda signed for Aarau in the Swiss second tier. In 2022, he signed for French Ligue 1 team Ajaccio.In the summer of 2023, Spadanuda signed a three-year contract with Luzern.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in Switzerland, Spadanuda is of Italian and Portuguese descent.

SUMMARY: Kevin Spadanuda (born 16 January 1997) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Luzern.
